prestige_gap.label: College Prestige Bias
prestige_gap.description: Tier-2/3 college automatically triggers lower shortlist priority regardless of skills
prestige_gap.recruiter_heuristic: Non-IIT/NIT = lower talent assumption in first 3 seconds

name_origin.label: Name-Origin Bias
name_origin.description: Candidate name reveals regional, caste, or religious identity
name_origin.recruiter_heuristic: Names signal state/community — triggers in-group/out-group bias unconsciously

gender_coded_language.label: Gender-Coded Language
gender_coded_language.description: Words like 'nurturing', 'supportive', 'managed household', 'coordinated team' signal gender
gender_coded_language.recruiter_heuristic: Soft-skill dominant language → recruiter infers gender → unconscious penalty for technical roles

career_gap.label: Unexplained Career Gap
career_gap.description: Employment or academic timeline gaps with no context explanation
career_gap.recruiter_heuristic: Gaps = risk flag = deprioritized even when skills are current

cgpa_penalty.label: CGPA Hard Filter
cgpa_penalty.description: CGPA below 7.0 used as binary filter even when project work is strong
cgpa_penalty.recruiter_heuristic: Sub-7 CGPA → auto-reject or bottom-pile in Indian campus drives

vernacular_english.label: Indian English Phrasing
vernacular_english.description: Resume uses Indian English constructions that Western-trained ATS/recruiters flag as unprofessional
vernacular_english.recruiter_heuristic: Phrasing like 'did the needful' → subconscious credibility drop

tier2_location.label: Non-Metro Geographic Bias
tier2_location.description: College or home city is a non-metro Tier-2/3 city
tier2_location.recruiter_heuristic: Non-metro origin → weaker network assumption → unconscious deprioritization

project_credibility.label: Project Credibility Discount
project_credibility.description: Self-taught or college projects described without metrics are dismissed vs corporate internship work
project_credibility.recruiter_heuristic: No company name + no numbers = toy project assumption, regardless of technical depth

degree_branch_bias.label: Degree/Branch Bias
degree_branch_bias.description: Candidates from non-CSE/IT branches are ranked lower despite having stronger skill alignment
degree_branch_bias.recruiter_heuristic: Non-CSE branch = assumed lack of coding depth in first screening

masculine_language_bias.label: Masculine-Coded Language
masculine_language_bias.description: Job description language uses terms that discourage diverse applications
masculine_language_bias.recruiter_heuristic: Masculine phrasing (rockstar, aggressive) reduces application rates from qualified diverse groups
